visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens inside a vehicle cabin with a man in his 40s wearing a checkered flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a white graphic t-shirt. He is seated in the driver's seat, looking sideways with a thoughtful expression as he gestures with his right hand toward the window. Natural daylight illuminates his face from the side, highlighting his skin texture and the fabric of his cap. (2) The shot cuts to the exterior of a retail storefront during the day. The man is seen walking towards the entrance, pointing his finger toward the shop window. The environment is a bright urban street with a bus stop visible in the background, and the shop's glass door reflects the outdoor light. (3) Inside the store, the man stands in front of display shelves filled with various colorful smartphone boxes. He looks directly at the camera, smiling and using active hand gestures to explain something. The lighting is bright, even studio-style indoor light, and his white t-shirt features bold black lettering reading 'MAY THE FORCE BE WITH YOU.' (4) A series of quick cuts follows, showing close-ups of product boxes. First, a black iPhone 16 Pro Max box is centered against a dark background, then a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra box, and finally an iPad box. Large, bright yellow and red text overlays with prices and savings amounts appear over these boxes. (5) The man returns to the frame in a medium close-up, standing against the retail backdrop. He holds up fingers to count off items, his expression energetic and persuasive. He wears a green beaded bracelet and a yellow smartwatch. The background is slightly blurred, focusing attention on his facial expressions and hand movements. (6) A close-up shot of a black box for a Huawei Watch GT5 is shown, with the watch face displayed on the packaging. Bright graphic overlays emphasizing the price appear over the center of the frame. (7) The video concludes with the man back in the store, pointing downwards towards a link location. He has a cheerful expression, gesturing widely with his hands to emphasize his final points while white and pink text bubbles float around his head in a variety-show style.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 欸老闆 母親節要到了 我想要送媽媽手機 你有什麼想法嗎. [Logo]: miko. [Slogan]: #煩惱的時刻 母親節要到了. (2) [Subtitle]: 我們現在剛好在車上 走 我現在帶妳去一家店. [Slogan]: #根本是天註定!. (3) [Subtitle]: 就是這裡啦 miko 帶妳去看 母親節優惠. (4) [Subtitle]: 店員都在忙 不過我已經問到了 他們母親節 5大優惠. [Variety]: 真的超划算~. [Slogan]: 5大優惠. (5) [Slogan]: #優惠一 舊機換新機. [Subtitle]: 第一個優惠呢 舊機換新機 最高可以折抵 37000元. (6) [Slogan]: #優惠二 精選手機 67折起. [Subtitle]: 第二優惠 精選手機 67折起. (7) [Slogan]: #iPhone 16 pro max 256GB 40190元 省4710元. (8) [Slogan]: #Samsung galaxy s25 ultra 256GB 34690元 省9210元. (9) [Slogan]: #iPad第9代 256GB 10490元 省4510元. (10) [Slogan]: #優惠三 搭配門號 送PF手工香氛蠟燭. [Subtitle]: 優惠三 搭配門號還送PF的手工香氛蠟燭 這時限量的喔. (11) [Slogan]: #優惠四 手機背帶 買1送1. [Subtitle]: 優惠四 手機背帶呢 買一送一. (12) [Slogan]: #HUWEI WATCH GT5 7990元 省1000元. [Subtitle]: 最後一個優惠呢 智慧型手錶 6折起 GT5喔 現在 7990. (13) [Subtitle]: 你看 我幫妳搞定了 米可是不是很罩? 妳等下就過去呢 直接去買母親節禮物. [Variety]: 米可是不是很罩?. (14) [Variety]: 五重優惠 相關訊息. [Subtitle]: 另外呢 五重優惠的相關訊息 連結我放下面! 快去看!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female hand partially visible in the first scene
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a checkered flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a white t-shirt with 'MAY THE FORCE BE WITH YOU' text.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves from a modern car interior with dark leather seats to a bright urban street with a bus shelter, and finally settles in a well-lit mobile phone retail store featuring rows of boxed electronic products on shelves and promotional posters.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a female voice speaking in a casual, curious tone against a backdrop of soft acoustic guitar strums and a light, upbeat percussion beat. The male voice responds with a warm, energetic timbre. A subtle car engine hum is barely audible in the low frequencies. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound effect triggers as the scene shifts, followed by the male voice's narration becoming more projected and high-pitched. The background music maintains a constant high-tempo 4/4 beat with synthetic clap sounds. (3) A bright 'pop' or 'bubble' sound effect occurs as text elements appear on the frame. The male narrator speaks quickly, enunciating price points with high vocal arousal and positive valence, emphasizing savings amounts with a slight rising intonation. (4) A 'ding' sound effect emphasizes a specific price reveal. The music bed remains consistent, with a bright spectral profile, while the voice continues to dominate the mix with a clear, broadcast-like quality and professional clarity. (5) Multiple rhythmic 'pop' sounds occur in rapid succession, synchronized with the appearance of list items. The narrator's speech rate is fast but clear, showing high dominance and confidence. The ambient floor is clean, suggesting high-quality field recording or post-processing. (6) A final 'stinger' or rising sound effect accompanies the closing call-to-action. The male voice ends on a high, friendly pitch, while the acoustic guitar and electronic percussion fade out together in a quick hard cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem Introduction -> Retail Solution -> Discount Itemization -> Final CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a strategic promotional advertisement for the miko retail brand, specifically targeting Mother's Day shoppers. It utilizes a well-known tech influencer's high-energy delivery to present a series of five enticing offers, including trade-ins, price drops on flagship smartphones, and bundled gifts, aimed at driving foot traffic to the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host explicitly names the retail brand 'miko', visits their physical store, and lists specific holiday promotions and discounts exclusive to that brand.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density social-media-native editing with constant text overlays and sound effects designed to maintain viewer attention during a product list.
